headline: Plug Power (PLUG) Says Barrow Green Hydrogen Project Reaches Final Investment Decision
summary: Plug Power Inc. (NASDAQ:PLUG) is one of the 10 Most Volatile Penny Stocks to Buy Now. On May 20, 2026, Plug Power Inc. (NASDAQ:PLUG) announced that the 30-megawatt Barrow Green Hydrogen project in Barrow-in-Furness, Cumbria, where Plug is supplying electrolyzers, reached final investment decision. The project is being delivered by Green Hydrogen Energy Company, a […]
